extraction.one_line_summary: VENDRAME Andrea soloed to victory from 150m after HAMILTON Chris delivered him to the line from a four-man front selection.
tactical_patterns: NIBALI Vincenzo attacked on descent with CICCONE, forcing INEOS chase despite Moscon crash—descent attacks fractured pink jersey group.
BRAMBILLA Gianluca and BENNETT George arguing mid-breakaway allowed HAMILTON Chris and VENDRAME Andrea to escape, proving cooperation critical.
ULISSI Diego presence in break signals AG2R prioritized stage hunting over GC defense despite having protected rider.
BOUCHARD Geoffrey collected 45 KOM points from break, revealing early-race KOM jersey holders sacrifice stage wins for classification points.

rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: negative: crashed early and abandoned, suggesting fragility or injury susceptibility in demanding stage races
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: crashed early and abandoned from 11th on GC, major setback for Movistar's podium ambitions
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: negative: abandoned with broken collarbone and six broken ribs after crash, losing pink jersey
rider_signals.VENDRAME Andrea: positive: won from tactical sprint after 212km, showing finisher speed even after maximum-distance stages
rider_signals.HAMILTON Chris: positive: attacked solo from four-man group on final climb, demonstrating DSM's ability to animate breakaways
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: attacked on descent gaining seconds on pink jersey group despite INEOS chase, still hunting time
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: negative: crashed on descent while chasing NIBALI, INEOS depth compensated but individual vulnerability exposed
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: neutral: attacked with NIBALI but gained minimal time, showing willingness to probe without decisive power
